message:
Fix unused variable/param errors for eval, f-strings, scoping

- lifetime.zig: Extract vars from eval() strings, analyze f-string parts
- types.zig: Track eval-string vars in SemanticInfo
- assign.zig: Emit `_ = x;` for eval-string vars
- allocator_analyzer.zig: f-strings use __global_allocator not param

Unit tests: 20 passed, 3 failed (was 16/7)
